title: 90m Natural Jute Twine - Strong, Durable, Biodegradable Garden Twine for Gardening, Floristry, and Bundling
features: 🌿Strong and durable: Jute twine is strong and durable enough to hold up to heavy loads.
🌿Biodegradable: Jute twine is biodegradable, so it's a sustainable choice for the environment.
🌿Affordable: Jute twine is an affordable option for a variety of projects.
🌿Long-lasting: Jute twine is long-lasting and can be used over and over again.
🌿90 meters (approx. 300 feet) of strong, durable natural jute twine Made from 100% natural, biodegradable jute
🌿Ideal for a variety of gardening, floristry, and bundling projects
🌿Perfect for tying up plants, staking tomatoes, and creating flower arrangements
